title: Jeevan Ek Sanghursh
subTitle: Karan, a good-hearted thief, is compelled to work for a criminal mastermind. However, things take a turn when he reunites with his estranged family and tries to leave the underworld.

title: Sachai Ki Taqat
subTitle: Sagar sets out to exact revenge against Dr Narendra, a smuggler who killed his father. But Sagar is soon framed for the murder of a woman and sent to jail.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Meri Adalat
subTitle: A tough cop's life is torn apart after his sister and her lover are brutally murdered. He then decides to take the law into his own hands in order to seek justice for his sister.

title: Main Azaad Hoon
subTitle: A reporter bribes a man to pose as an anti-corruption crusader to popularise his paper. Despite gaining fame, the man buckles under the pressure of people's expectations from him.

title: Aurat Teri Yehi Kahani
subTitle: Savitri, a motherless girl, is forced to marry an elderly man for her family's sake. However, after her husband's sudden death, her life takes a turn for the worse.

title: Haathkadi
subTitle: ACP Suraj, an honest policeman, swears revenge on culprits when his innocent brother is killed. However, he is soon accused of murder and is remanded to prison.

title: Meherbaan
subTitle: Ravi promises his father on his deathbed that he will take care of Chaurangilal's family whenever the need arises. However, a cunning Chaurangilal, concocts a plan to leave Ravi bankrupt and take over his wealth.

title: Jawani Zindabad
subTitle: Shashi gets his sister married to Ravi without offering dowry in order to take a stand against the practice. However, he gets harassed by his sister's in-laws for his stance.

title: Shola Aur Shabnam
subTitle: Divya loves Karan and plans to get married to him. However, a notorious gangster's brother, Bali, who also has his eyes on her, goes to great lengths to destroy her relationship with Karan.

title: Izzat Ki Roti
subTitle: Laxmi lives happily with her sons Krishna and Jeet. However, jealous Veerendra Pratap tries to steal her business by turning the brothers against each other.

title: Izzat Ki Roti
subTitle: Laxmi lives happily with her sons Krishna and Jeet. However, jealous Veerendra Pratap tries to steal her business by turning the brothers against each other.

title: Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega
subTitle: Raj, an aspiring singer, rescues Pooja, the daughter of a wealthy man, from an accident. However, he soon finds himself in a web of complications when he falls in love with her best friend.

title: Tathastu
subTitle: A factory worker's son needs a heart transplant but the hospital will not go ahead with it without paying upfront. So, he is forced to take the law into his own hands to save his sick child.

title: Corporate
subTitle: An ambitious career woman unknowingly becomes a pawn in a corporate war between two rival companies and gets caught in a web that shatters her professional and personal life.

title: Jeevan Ek Sanghursh
subTitle: Karan, a good-hearted thief, is compelled to work for a criminal mastermind. However, things take a turn when he reunites with his estranged family and tries to leave the underworld.

title: Naajayaz
subTitle: Jai and Sandhya pursue gangster Raj Solanki, but the case takes a shocking twist when Jai discovers Raj is his long-lost father.

title: Parampara
subTitle: Pratap and Ranvir want to settle their family fight by risking their friendship in a dangerous duel. Eventually, they reunite and embrace each other as brothers for the first time.

title: Pyar Ke Naam Qurbaan
subTitle: Billu attempts to play Holi with Devika, but she gets him arrested. In an attempt to take revenge, he kidnaps her, which infuriates her brother, who sets out to save her.

title: Dil Hai Ke Manta Nahin
subTitle: When Pooja flees from home to reunite with her boyfriend, she meets Raghu, who agrees to escort her. As they travel together, she subsequently catches feelings for him.

title: Raaz
subTitle: Sanjana and Aditya go to Ooty for a holiday to save their unsteady marriage. However, she is haunted by a spirit who reveals some dark secrets about her husband and his past.

title: Raaz
subTitle: Sanjana and Aditya go to Ooty for a holiday to save their unsteady marriage. However, she is haunted by a spirit who reveals some dark secrets about her husband and his past.

title: Sheshnaag
subTitle: Pritam and Banu, two shape-shifting snakes in human form, seek protection from a young man when an evil priest tries to hunt them down and use them in a ritual for wealth and immortality.

subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
